_purpose: Declare every repo-owned Python command/helper surface that contains exit-zero attention-state terms. The gate prevents new no_adapter/disabled/not_configured/skipped/prose-review-required states from silently reading as clean pass states.
_contract: Every detected file must declare its exact states, at least one visibility class, evidence_terms that appear in the source, and a rationale. Use local_noop_not_closeout only for runtime/internal no-op payloads that are not standing quality or release closeout proof.

skills/public/handoff/scripts/chunked_ro.rationale: When the handoff adapter's issue_source is disabled (or no tracker resolves), build_issue_entries returns [] and the chunker falls back to doc-only chunking. This is a deliberate runtime no-op (the pickup still produces a valid handoff-only ranking), not a quality/release closeout signal; the parse payload surfaces issue_entry_count=0 so the doc-only fallback is visible.

scripts/build_debug_seam_risk_index.py.rationale: Skipped debug artifacts are listed in the index payload with reasons and are not treated as clean seam-risk proof.

scripts/cautilus_adapter_lib.py.rationale: Disabled Cautilus policy is exposed through adapter payloads and operator-facing next-action text.

scripts/check_cli_skill_surface.py.rationale: The release/quality CLI surface check returns an explicit skipped status and reason when no relevant surface changed.

scripts/check_command_docs.py.rationale: Repos without command-doc contracts get an explicit skipped status and reason.

scripts/check_coverage.py.rationale: Coverage helper tests and payloads keep disabled Cautilus policy explicit rather than silent.

scripts/check_coverage_lib.py.rationale: Coverage library preserves disabled tool state through the shared lifecycle payload.

scripts/check_seed_fixture_budget.py.rationale: Seed fixture budget gate reports advisory-only when no pytest tmp directory has been materialized yet; payload exposes the classification.

scripts/check_mutation_score.py.rationale: Mutation skipped workers are counted in the printed score summary.

scripts/check_upstream_support_drift.py.rationale: Skipped upstream checks are surfaced as per-record errors in the drift report.

scripts/control_plane_lifecycle_lib.py.rationale: Tool lifecycle disabled states share one explicit payload for detect and healthcheck output.

scripts/doctor.py.rationale: Doctor output reports disabled tool installs and skipped release probes as structured JSON.

scripts/doctor_lib.py.rationale: Doctor library exposes disabled and skipped healthcheck states with next steps.

scripts/filter_cosmic_ray_mutants.py.rationale: Filtered mutation work is summarized by inspected and skipped counts.

scripts/github_actions_lib.py.rationale: Skipped workflow steps are parsed as source facts for downstream gates, not closeout proof.

scripts/host_hook_find_skills.py.rationale: find-skills routing hook install/uninstall library exposes the per-host find_skills_routing intent (enabled/disabled) in the reconcile payload under actions['find_skills_routing']; a disabled (opt-in default) intent uninstalls/no-ops and cannot read as a silent install.

scripts/host_hook_install_lib.py.rationale: Host-hook install/uninstall library exposes per-host intent (enabled/disabled) in reconcile and status payloads so adapter-driven no-op runs cannot read as silent install.

scripts/install_machine_local.py.rationale: Machine-local install output names skipped marketplace updates directly.

scripts/install_tools.py.rationale: Tool installation reports disabled adapter state as structured skipped output.

scripts/plan_cautilus_proof.py.rationale: Cautilus proof planning explicitly tells operators not to run disabled evaluator proof.

scripts/plugin_preamble.py.rationale: Plugin preamble prints disabled runtime self-update status.

scripts/retro_persistence_lib.py.rationale: Retro persistence records skipped summary refresh reasons in payload state.

scripts/run_cosmic_ray_mutation.py.rationale: When no TOML parser (tomllib/tomli) is available the runner cannot read module-path, so the defensive restore is disabled and degrades to a no-op while the mutation run itself proceeds unaffected. A runtime no-op, not a quality/release closeout signal; the message is written to stdout so the disabled safety net is visible rather than silent.

scripts/run_slice_closeout.py.rationale: Slice closeout carries the Cautilus planner disabled state into closeout decisions and prints an explicit skipped broad-pytest summary in pre-lock rehearsal mode.

scripts/slice_closeout_broad_gate.py.rationale: Pre-lock slice closeout can explicitly skip broad pytest while preserving deterministic checks; the payload names skipped_broad_pytest_commands and the lock-required state so skipped broad proof cannot read as full closeout proof.

scripts/classify_t_signal.py.rationale: T-signal classifier exposes skipped reasons (no_parent, shallow_clone, diff_unavailable) in its structured result so callers can attach classification_skipped to the durable episode record instead of silently emitting t_status none.

scripts/slice_closeout_usage_episode.py.rationale: Slice closeout usage emission reports disabled or missing adapter state in the closeout payload, and propagates the classifier's skipped reason as classification_skipped on the durable episode record instead of treating telemetry absence as successful capture.

scripts/sync_support.py.rationale: Support sync returns explicit skipped status for non-materialized or irrelevant sync work.

scripts/t_events_emit_lib.py.rationale: T-event emission is runtime telemetry; no-op reasons are returned to callers and are not quality closeout proof.

scripts/update_tools.py.rationale: Tool update reports disabled adapter state as structured skipped output.

scripts/usage_episode_session_start.py.rationale: SessionStart hook payload returns local no-op statuses (no_adapter, disabled) so optional capture can stay silent without ever being treated as closeout proof; statuses are surfaced via CHARNESS_SESSION_START_DEBUG diagnostics.

evidence_terms: cautilus proof disabled by repo adapter
scripts/validate_cautilus_proof.py.rationale: Disabled Cautilus proof is printed as the validator outcome.

scripts/validate_inventory_consumption.p.rationale: The validator fails current artifacts missing prose-review engagement and explicitly reports grandfathered artifacts.

scripts/validate_inventory_consumption_d.rationale: Opted-out inventory declarations are handled by the companion coverage validator.

scripts/validate_maintainer_setup.py.rationale: Non-git worktrees get an explicit skipped maintainer-hook message.

scripts/validate_usage_episodes.py.rationale: Usage episode opt-in absence and disabled state remain non-failing but visible in JSON and normal output.

scripts/report_usage_episodes.py.rationale: Usage episode report absence, disabled state, and empty capture remain non-failing but visible, with explicit non-claims so summaries are not mistaken for product-success proof.

scripts/report_usage_product_review.py.rationale: The product-review reporter reuses usage-episode adapter readiness states and renders them as explicit warnings or unavailable status instead of treating missing capture as last-seen product-review proof.

scripts/usage_episode_product_review.py.rationale: Missed-detection candidate reporting treats `classification_skipped` as evidence in a reporter payload, not as a silent clean state.

scripts/worktree_audit_lib.py.rationale: Worktree audit includes skipped counts in summaries.

scripts/worktree_cleanup_lib.py.rationale: Cleanup actions report skipped action state and reason in the action payload.

scripts/worktree_doctor_lib.py.rationale: Worktree doctor renders skipped checks in operator output.

scripts/worktree_doctor_state.py.rationale: The state module defines the canonical skipped value consumed by worktree doctor renderers.

skills/public/gather/scripts/advise_goog.rationale: Google Workspace advice reports skipped doctor status when the host capability is unavailable.

skills/public/gather/scripts/advise_slac.rationale: Slack advice reports skipped doctor status when the host capability is unavailable.

skills/public/gather/scripts/gather_publ.rationale: Skipped acquisition stages are represented in the public URL gather attempt trace.

skills/public/quality/references/find_in.rationale: Inline-prompt bulk helper marks default-glob scans as advisory-only when no canonical prompt_asset_roots are supplied; classification is in stdout and JSON payload.

skills/public/quality/scripts/inventory_.rationale: CLI ergonomics inventory prints an advisory-only scope_classification (carried from cli_ergonomics_lib) so green output cannot be read as enforcement.

skills/public/quality/scripts/skill_ergo.rationale: Skill ergonomics prose-review-required states produce advisory payloads consumed by quality artifacts.

skills/public/quality/scripts/validate_s.rationale: Empty or disabled skill ergonomics enforcement remains exit-zero but emits warnings.

skills/public/release/scripts/check_fres.rationale: Release fresh-checkout absence is written into the release artifact and plain output.

skills/public/release/scripts/check_requ.rationale: Release requested-review absence remains non-blocking only with an explicit warning.

skills/public/release/scripts/init_adapt.rationale: Generated release adapter patterns include explicit skipped-review phrases for gate parsing.

evidence_terms: No repo-declared fresh checkout probes were configured
skills/public/release/scripts/publish_re.rationale: Release helper writes not-configured fresh-checkout status into the release artifact.
Release-triggered retro closeout records skipped trigger evaluations in the release payload/artifact, while matched triggers persist a bounded retro artifact.

skills/public/release/scripts/resolve_ad.rationale: Release adapter parsing preserves skipped-review patterns for requested-review gate decisions.

skills/public/setup/scripts/seed_depende.rationale: Dependency seeding reports skipped dependency setup as structured payload status.

skills/public/setup/scripts/seed_t_event.rationale: Seeded T-events adapter starts disabled in checked-in config text so the opt-in state is visible.

evidence_terms: Markdown preview is disabled by config.
skills/support/markdown-preview/scripts/.rationale: Markdown preview disabled state includes a warning in the render payload.

skills/support/web-fetch/scripts/acquisi.rationale: Web-fetch skipped acquisition attempts are explicit trace entries.

scripts/check_prescribed_skill_executed..rationale: Shared closeout helper CLI surfaces each skipped required evidence name with an enum-bounded reason; absence of a recognized reason fails the gate.

scripts/check_prescribed_skill_executed_.rationale: Shared closeout helper library carries the same enum-bounded skip semantics into structured ok/blockers payloads consumed by achieve/issue/release closeout gates.

skills/public/achieve/scripts/goal_artif.rationale: Achieve After-phase closeout writes per-evidence-name `skipped: <enum>: <detail>` lines into the goal artifact so the persisted reason stays operator-visible.

Sibling module split out of goal_artifact_lib; mirrors the same closeout-evidence skip semantics (per-evidence-name skip lines extracted from the goal artifact body and forwarded to the shared closeout helper).

Before-phase discussion readiness treats n/a/none summaries as absent when consequential activation decisions are present; a real summary must be visible in the goal artifact before pursue-ready passes.

skills/public/issue/scripts/issue_create.rationale: issue create emits a stdout payload whose body_verified is null with an explicit verify_skipped/verify_error note when read-back is disabled (verify=False) or not feasible; an unverified write is surfaced to the operator, never silently treated as a confirmed write.

skills/public/issue/scripts/issue_resolu.rationale: Issue closeout verifier reports an explicit skipped_classification payload and refuses closure when a required resolution-critique skip lacks a recognized host-blocked reason.

skills/public/release/scripts/publish_re.rationale: Release publish preflight refuses without an explicit `--critique-artifact` or `--critique-blocked <host-signal>`; the blocked path is recorded as a skipped standalone-critique reason in the shared closeout payload, and adapter preflight records not_configured/not_evaluable as release-artifact-visible non-claims when a changed adapter cannot run focused commands.
